content:
Hello guys,

All NDA files have been mass sent out via Docusign!
Sorry for the delay!

Please carefully **read this guide** before signing the Volunteer Project's NDA through Docusign:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ygsRTJkVeivPaXvOvfxjlnODC94uXJMjSkWmiasz48Y/edit?usp=sharing

If you have any questions, please let me know.

embeds.title: Morimens Volunteer NDA Docusign Guide
embeds.description: Morimens Volunteer NDA Docusign Guide  This document will guide you through how to sign the NDA agreement via Docusign.  STEP 1:  Find the Docusign E-mail. If you don’t find it, please check your Updates or Spam folder.   STEP 2:  Click on “REVIEW DOCUMENT”.  STEP 3: Click on Signature in the up...

content: <@1376763322568937562> so we don't need to write effective date?
...I don't have a driver's license, nor a passport. <:aurita_dizzy:1408324284702654556>
What other forms of ID would be acceptable?

<@1376763322568937562> I already signed NDAs the first time since you invited, but from the guide it seems might not have been particularly formal. Do I need to sign it again, or is it already fine? Because I haven't received an email yet.

I'd like to know as well, I don't have a license and I have to renew my passport so it's not valid at the moment
I have a good old classic ID card though
I defaulted to putting in my ID card number as I signed it before the guide went up, if passport/diver's license is needed I could redo

I've (mostly) sorted all of the identified chunks into where they go, and deleted their corresponding messages here.
~~I appear to be missing Ryker's Special Ops, "Happy Hunting!", but I may have accidentally folded it in with some other story chunk. If that's the case, I'll find it when I go through each sheet for other reasons later.~~ Found it! It was in Liz's Deepdive chunk lols

~~Next problem I need solving:

Can someone with more unlocked stories than me help identify the Stage Names? I can do the ones that I have unlocked, but I need help with the ones I don't. For example, the info I need from Chapter 3 would be:

Think before you act / Good news, bad news / Greetings, lady daffodil / Welcome to rye / Sleeved trump / Thorn in flesh / Bon voyage / The friendless / Fair trade / Beneath the brim / Genesis return / Yesterday again / The current will guide you / Unbroken sanctity

These are the stories I have unlocked and/or otherwise **DON'T** need this info for:
- Act 1, up to and including Chapter 7
- Daffodil, Horla & G Helot Special Ops
- Ogier, G Ramona, Kathigu-Ra & Pickman Psyche Deepdive
- Miryam & Summer event Dreamscape
- Multidimensional Link "My Turn!"
- Reproduction Frenzy (doesn't have stages)~~

Thanks!
Just realized this info is actually in the files I was working with already, so I don't actually need it lol
<@1376763322568937562> forgot the tag, it's nothing urgent though!
